text: I wake up at six every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a light stretch. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit—while checking my emails. My work schedule is consistent: I arrive at the office by eight, attend meetings, and focus on tasks until lunch. In the afternoon, I take a short walk to clear my mind. After work, I exercise for thirty minutes, either jogging or doing yoga at home. Evenings are for relaxing—I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. By ten, I’m in bed, ready to repeat the same routine the next day.
